ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customer_arrivals" (
  "arrival_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each arrival record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "service_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service point */,
  "arrival_timestamp" TEXT /* Exact timestamp of the customer's arrival */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("arrival_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "waiting_times" (
  "waiting_time_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each waiting time record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "service_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service point */,
  "waiting_time" REAL /* Total waiting time in seconds */,
  "waiting_timestamp" TEXT /* Exact timestamp when the waiting started */,
  "queue_position" INTEGER /* Initial position in the queue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("waiting_time_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_times" (
  "service_time_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service time record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "service_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service point */,
  "service_start_timestamp" TEXT /* Exact timestamp when the service started */,
  "service_end_timestamp" TEXT /* Exact timestamp when the service ended */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who provided the service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_time_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "queue_length" (
  "queue_length_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each queue length record */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "service_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service point */,
  "queue_length" INTEGER /* Total length of the queue at that moment */,
  "queue_timestamp" TEXT /* Exact timestamp when the queue length was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("queue_length_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_choices" (
  "choice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each choice record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "service_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service point */,
  "choice" INTEGER /* Choice made by the customer (e.g., service point selected) */,
  "precheck" INTEGER /* Precheck status of the customer (e.g., whether they pre-registered) */,
  "choice_timestamp" TEXT /* Exact timestamp when the choice was made */,
  "precheck_details" TEXT /* Details about the pre-check process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("choice_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the service location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the service location */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager responsible for the location */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the location */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "employee_name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the employee (e.g., cashier, customer service rep) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the employee works */,
  "shift_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the employee's shift */,
  "shift_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the employee's shift */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service metric record */,
  "arrival_id" INTEGER /* Reference ID for the arrival record */,
  "waiting_time_id" INTEGER /* Reference ID for the waiting time record */,
  "service_time_id" INTEGER /* Reference ID for the service time record */,
  "queue_length_id" INTEGER /* Reference ID for the queue length record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "service_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service point */,
  "metric_timestamp" TEXT /* Exact timestamp when the metrics were recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_metrics_arrival_id FOREIGN KEY ("arrival_id") REFERENCES customer_arrivals ("arrival_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_metrics_waiting_time_id FOREIGN KEY ("waiting_time_id") REFERENCES waiting_times ("waiting_time_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_metrics_service_time_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_time_id") REFERENCES service_times ("service_time_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_metrics_service_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_point_id") REFERENCES service_times ("service_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_metrics_queue_length_id FOREIGN KEY ("queue_length_id") REFERENCES queue_length ("queue_length_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_metrics_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_metrics_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer providing feedback */,
  "service_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service point */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (e.g., on a scale of 1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the customer */,
  "feedback_timestamp" TEXT /* Exact timestamp when the feedback was provided */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Reference ID for the service record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES service_times ("service_time_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for logging into the system */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager, staff) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the user account */,
  "last_login_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "last_password_change_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last password change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
